diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Direct bystander-observable sign of severe compromise.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe scalp haemorrhage and thigh deformity

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Major multi-system trauma with haemorrhagic shock
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Confirms multiple significant sources of blood loss.
High-energy mechanism strongly predicts multi-system injury.

symptoms.symptom_name: GCS 6, hypotension, flail chest, unstable pelvis

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Major multi-system trauma with haemorrhagic shock
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Objective confirmation; clinician-only findings sealed from telehealth chat.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Unconsciousness with deteriorating breathing, visible major haemorrhage/deformity, and a high-energy mechanism together confirm major trauma requiring maximal emergency response.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Upgraded aeromedical/Intensive Care Paramedic trauma response with on-scene blood products if available
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Definitive pre-hospital management for major trauma with shock.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Whole-body trauma CT and FAST ultrasound on hospital arrival
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Identifies the full extent of injuries for damage-control surgery planning.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Waiting for a standard (non-upgraded) ambulance response without requesting trauma-level resources
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Would risk delayed access to blood products and trauma surgical capability critical for survival.
